summary: Replaced the single Approve+alwaysAllow checkbox with three explicit buttons: Deny (red outline), Allow Once (green outline), Always Allow (green filled). Always Allow is hidden for critical-risk tools. Keyboard shortcuts updated: Enter=Allow Once, Shift+Enter=Always Allow, Esc=Deny. Added post-decision audit badge to ToolCallCard header: green 'Approved' for allow-once, green 'Auto-approved' for always-allow, red 'Denied' for deny. The badge is stored as approvalDecision:'once'|'always'|'denied' on the ToolCall type and is set by markToolApproval() in use-rust-agent.ts, called from resolveApproval() in useAgent.ts before the IPC call. All existing Rust backend wiring (resolveApproval IPC) is unchanged.
